notes_for_human_reviewer: Solid intermediate. Names five of the seven omission categories (change mgmt, training, hypercare, PMO, documentation/transition). Names the activity-vs-deliverable distinction with three specific rewrites. Decomposition critique addresses both depth (the small leaves in 1.2.1) and consistency (1.2.2/1.2.3 underdeveloped vs 1.2.1). Cross-artefact reasoning is correct (hypercare-budget, change-mgmt-RAM) but only two examples and tolerance on the third dimension widened to 2 because the reasoning is correct-but-light. Validation move is specific and chapter-aligned (workshop with the doers, scoped to the time pressure, coordinator's facilitation/capture jobs named). Not yet hire-ready — could go deeper on the artifact-is-residue framing and could trace more gaps cross-artifact.
